mapper.sql: unit_price_id, code, region, dormitory_id, room_id, usage_type_code, daily_unit_price, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.update: UPDATE unit_price SET code = #{code}, region = #{region}, dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}, room_id = #{roomId}, usage_type_code = #{usageTypeCode}, daily_unit_price = #{dailyUnitPrice}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE unit_price_id = #{unitPriceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM unit_price WHERE unit_price_id = #{unitPriceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM unit_price WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM unit_price WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND region = #{region} AND usage_type_code = #{usageTypeCode} AND dormitory_id IS NULL AND room_id IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
